meta.purpose: Trading-day market-open financial intelligence report for Jun; not an automatic broker.
precedentBasis: FRED: source trust, release metadata, composable indicators
Bloomberg/Koyfin/TradingView: market cockpit, watchlists, cross-asset tape
BIS/Treasury: liquidity, credit, fiscal plumbing, data dictionaries
World Bank/JPMorgan/BlackRock: report-native chartbook and committee framing
liveDataSources: Yahoo Finance chart API public/unofficial endpoint
meta.operationalAuditNote: web_search unavailable for this run; dashboard was audited from local/public-data snapshot and must not claim fresh external/news research.

holdingDataContract.policy: Missing values are explicit nulls with confidence=missing; no synthetic fundamentals or earnings dates are invented.

marketRegime.inflation: Live proxy: breakeven/rates check required; see FRED T10YIE
marketRegime.mostImportantMacroSignal: 2Y/10Y curve is 0.47 pts; watch rate pressure and cycle signal.
marketRegime.confidence: Medium for prices/rates; low for fundamentals/news until adapters are added.
evidence: FRED CSV endpoint for Treasury/rates/credit indicators

kostolanyCycle.interpretation: Core compounders still supported, but levered/speculative exposures need stricter review because crowding and liquidity sensitivity can dominate fundamentals.

valuationExpectation.method: Compare current valuation, earnings revisions, guidance, growth quality, and implied expectations against SPY opportunity cost.
valuationExpectation.status: Partially live: price, market value, weights, recent performance, rates, credit, and SEC filing metadata are active. Forward fundamentals/valuation estimates still need provider or deeper SEC companyfacts adapter.

rebalance.rationale: Levered/speculative exposures require review before adding risk. Core quality bucket remains intact.
addWatch: To be generated by Opportunity Scout from live regime + valuation screens.
doNotDo: Do not turn this into automatic trading.
Do not use mock data for decisions.
Do not assign BUY/SELL language; use allowed action signals only.

opportunityScout.method: Generated from active market force fields and local public-data snapshot; candidates remain research-only until evidence gates pass.

candidates.name: NVIDIA
candidates.thesis: Direct exposure to AI accelerator demand; useful benchmark for whether the portfolio should own the center of the AI capex stack instead of only cloud/platform beneficiaries.
candidates.whyNow: AI infrastructure remains an active force in the current report; candidate should be watched for pullbacks or earnings-confirmed demand durability.
dataSupport: Source: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available); as of 2026-05-18T16:30:48.000Z
confirmBeforeAdd: Forward revenue/gross-margin durability remains intact
Valuation reset or earnings growth justifies multiple
Customer concentration and export-control risks are understood

candidates.name: Broadcom
candidates.thesis: Picks-and-shovels exposure to AI networking and custom ASIC demand with a more diversified enterprise/software profile than pure GPU exposure.
candidates.whyNow: If AI capex stays strong but mega-cap platform exposure is already high, Broadcom gives a different layer of the same force field.
dataSupport: Source: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available); as of 2026-05-18T16:30:46.000Z
confirmBeforeAdd: AI semiconductor growth offsets cyclicality
Debt/software integration risk remains controlled
Price action is not purely multiple expansion

candidates.name: Vertiv
candidates.thesis: Infrastructure-side exposure to AI/data-center buildout: power, cooling, and uptime constraints rather than model/platform winners.
candidates.whyNow: The portfolio already has cloud and power exposure; VRT tests whether physical bottlenecks deserve a dedicated research lane.
dataSupport: Source: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available); as of 2026-05-18T16:30:46.000Z
confirmBeforeAdd: Backlog/order growth supports the AI infrastructure thesis
Margins remain resilient as capacity scales
Entry price compensates for crowded theme risk

candidates.name: Alphabet
candidates.theme: Quality compounder / AI platform laggard candidate
candidates.thesis: Potential quality compounder if search/cloud/AI investment remains durable and valuation offers a cleaner margin of safety than hotter AI infrastructure names.
candidates.whyNow: Useful comparison against existing MSFT/AMZN/META exposure before adding more platform concentration.
dataSupport: Source: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available); as of 2026-05-18T16:30:46.000Z
confirmBeforeAdd: Cloud and AI monetization progress is visible
Regulatory/search risks are priced in
Relative valuation is attractive versus existing platform holdings

candidates.name: iShares Bitcoin Trust
candidates.thesis: A cleaner vehicle to compare against levered/path-dependent crypto exposure; may reduce decay risk while preserving directional Bitcoin beta.
candidates.whyNow: CONL-style levered decay is already flagged as a risk-control focus; substitute vehicles should be compared before adding or holding levered beta.
dataSupport: Source: Yahoo Finance chart API (public/unofficial; 1m intraday when available); as of 2026-05-18T16:30:45.000Z
confirmBeforeAdd: Explicit risk budget for crypto beta
Liquidity regime supports risk assets
Expense, tracking, and drawdown profile beat levered alternatives

opportunityScout.promotionRule: Promote only with source evidence, add zone, invalidation, portfolio role, and risk budget.

keyRisks: Levered products can decay even if the broad thesis is directionally right.
AI infrastructure narratives can become crowded before fundamentals catch up.
Macro rate pressure can compress valuation multiples across long-duration equities.
Unknown speculative tickers need thesis verification before any conclusion.
humanReviewRequired: Any EXIT REVIEW or TRIM CANDIDATE wording
Any valuation conclusion based on unverified data

finalOutput.mostImportantHoldingUpdate: CONL and TSLT remain the risk-control focus in the sample state.
finalOutput.finalJudgment: Live public market/rates/SEC filing metadata are active. Next layer: SEC companyfacts fundamentals, valuation estimates, news/community ingestion, and alert/state transition automation.

marketForces.name: Rates pressure
marketForces.interpretation: Higher long-end rates pressure long-duration growth multiples and make valuation discipline more important.

marketForces.name: Risk appetite
marketForces.interpretation: Index and volatility behavior sets the risk budget for speculative and levered exposure.

marketForces.name: AI infrastructure
marketForces.interpretation: AI capex, cloud demand, power scarcity, and data-center buildout remain a portfolio force but need crowding checks.

marketForces.name: Crypto liquidity beta
marketForces.interpretation: Crypto beta can amplify upside but is highly liquidity-sensitive and path-dependent through levered products.

marketForces.name: Credit conditions
marketForces.interpretation: Credit spreads are a plumbing check: if they widen while equities rise, risk appetite may be less durable.

marketForces.name: Inflation expectation
marketForces.interpretation: Inflation expectations influence rates, consumer pressure, and valuation multiples.

watchTriggers: If VIX moves above 22, reduce speculative/levered risk review threshold.
If 10Y Treasury continues rising, pressure-test high-duration AI/cloud multiples.
If HY spreads widen materially, treat risk appetite as fragile even if indices stay green.
If AI infrastructure force remains hot while valuation expands, require stronger evidence before adding.
If an opportunity candidate lacks a clear downside case, keep it as research only.
strategy.strategyPosture: Preserve core compounders, isolate levered/path-dependent risk, scout adds only where valuation, catalyst, and downside clarity align.

fractalMarketAssessment.portfolioImplication: Preserve core compounders, avoid adding single-layer hype, keep levered/speculative products on explicit risk budget, and prioritize thesis verification for unknown names.
fractalMarketAssessment.nextPostureTrigger: Upgrade risk posture only if VIX < 17, credit remains benign, SPY/QQQ breadth confirms, and candidates enter defined value zones with thesis confirmation.
fractalMarketAssessment.sourceCaveat: Price/rates/credit/SEC filing metadata are public-source live. News/community/fundamentals estimates remain limited until adapters or providers are added.

portfolioStory.objective: Make profit by minimizing avoidable risk: protect core, keep tactical risk small, verify unknowns, and only add where value zone + thesis + portfolio fit align.
portfolioStory.currentStory: Protected core carries most weight; Speculative thesis-verification bucket is meaningful and must be proven.

buckets.label: Protected core
buckets.posture: compound / hold with defined risk triggers

buckets.label: Tactical risk
buckets.posture: small bucket; trim/exit discipline matters more than thesis loyalty

buckets.label: Unknown thesis
buckets.posture: freeze adds until filings/liquidity/downside are verified

buckets.label: Other exposure
buckets.posture: monitor for overlap and opportunity cost

riskQueue.rule: Use strength to reduce fragility; do not average down below invalidation.
Chart can guide timing, but action is frozen until thesis/liquidity/downside are verified.

allowedNow: Protect profitable/core positions unless thesis or macro regime breaks.
Investigate unclear/speculative holdings before adding capital.
Use prepared zones; do not chase single-day strength.
Treat levered products as short-horizon risk instruments.
forbiddenNow: No add-candidate upgrade without downside case.
No portfolio-risk increase from one-layer chart excitement.
No paid-data assumption unless source is actually connected.
